creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
Created attachment 222449
update net-im/py-matrix-synapse to 1.26.0

This patch updates net-im/py-matrix-synapse from 1.25.0 to 1.26.0. As is usual for this project, the update is a mix between features and bugfixes. Details can be found at the URL linked in the PR's URL field. 

From a ports perspective, the update is little more than a simple version bump. I've synced the updated dependency on psycopg2>2.8.


portlint: "OK" (3 Warnings, none new)
testport: OK (poudriere: 122amd64)
do-test: OK (Ran 1463 tests in 755.097s, PASSED (skips=16, successes=1447))


The port has also been running just fine in production for a few days without any noticable problems. :)

Cheers,
Sascha
